slots.title: Fly from Gothenburg to Iceland
slots.details: Arrival-day intercity transfer. Timing is estimated in offline mode.
slots.rationale: Explicitly model day-one departure and arrival connection.

slots.title: Pick up rental car and drive to city
slots.details: Collect rental car at arrival hub and transfer to city center.
slots.rationale: Make airport/terminal to city movement explicit.

slots.title: Arrival lunch
slots.details: Light meal near city center before afternoon activity.
slots.rationale: Keep day-one pacing realistic after transit.

slots.title: Iceland Day 1 easy intro sightseeing
slots.details: Low-intensity scenic intro with flexible duration.
slots.rationale: Avoid overloading arrival day.

slots.title: Check in accommodation
slots.details: 2-bedroom budget guesthouse or apartment.
slots.rationale: Early rest for full itinerary execution from day two.

slots.title: Breakfast
slots.details: Simple breakfast near accommodation.
slots.rationale: Stable start for the day.
